---
title: "Portfolio"
toc: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(htmltools)
```

::: {.portafolio-header}
<span class="portafolio-titulo-chip">📊 Scripts Portfolio</span>

# R Scripts · Data Processing, Analysis & Visualization

<p class="portafolio-descripcion">A collection of practical R scripts on data processing, statistical analysis, and information visualization developed in research and institutional projects.</p>
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
📌 **Under construction** — I'm preparing a collection of **R scripts** on data processing, statistical analysis, and visualization. Come back soon!
:::
